data.title: Georgia Capital PLC Executes Share Buyback of 20,000 Shares
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Georgia Capital PLC ( (GB:CGEO) ) has issued an update.

Georgia Capital PLC announced a transaction involving the repurchase of 20,000 ordinary shares as part of its share buyback and cancellation program initiated in December 2024. The shares were bought on the London Stock Exchange at an average price of 1171.0937 pence per share, and an application will be made to cancel these shares later this month. This move is expected to influence the company’s share dynamics by increasing the number of shares held in treasury to 192,567, potentially enhancing shareholder value and consolidating voting power with 39,366,568 voting rights remaining.

More about Georgia Capital PLC

YTD Price Performance: -0.33%

data.description:

The latest announcement is out from Paragon Banking Group PLC ( (GB:PAG) ).

Paragon Banking Group PLC has announced the repurchase of 82,637 of its ordinary shares at an average price of 693.8904 pence per share as part of its ongoing share buyback program, which totals up to £50 million. This transaction, executed through Peel Hunt LLP, reflects the company’s commitment to enhancing shareholder value and maintaining strategic control over its equity structure, potentially impacting its market positioning and investor relations.

More about Paragon Banking Group PLC

Paragon Banking Group PLC operates within the financial services industry, focusing primarily on banking solutions. The company is engaged in providing banking services and financial products, with a particular emphasis on mortgage and loan offerings, catering to both individual and business clients.

data.title: Two Hands Corp Expands Board with New Appointments
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Two Hands Corporation ( (TWOH) ) has provided an update.

Two Hands Corporation has appointed Andrew Kucharchuk and Craig Marshak as new members of its Board of Directors. This decision, effective immediately, expands the board to include Emil Assentato alongside the new appointees. Andrew Kucharchuk brings extensive experience from his roles at Adhera Therapeutics and Theralink Technologies, while Craig Marshak adds his expertise from his background in investment banking and venture capital, including significant restructuring projects and investments in technology and healthcare sectors. These appointments are expected to strengthen Two Hands Corporation’s strategic direction and enhance its operational capabilities.

More about Two Hands Corporation

data.title: Firm Capital Announces Special Year-End Dividend and 2025 Dividend Schedule
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Firm Cap Mortgage Invest ( (TSE:FC) ) has provided an update.

Firm Capital Mortgage Investment Corporation has announced a special year-end dividend of $0.056 per common share, in addition to the regular December dividend, totaling $0.134 per common share payable on January 15, 2025. This reflects a slight increase in total dividends paid in 2024 compared to the previous year, indicating a successful year in exceeding their regular dividend income. The announcement also includes scheduled monthly dividends for the early months of 2025, underscoring the corporation’s commitment to providing consistent returns to its shareholders.

More about Firm Cap Mortgage Invest

Firm Capital Mortgage Investment Corporation is a non-bank lender focused on providing residential and commercial short-term bridge and conventional real estate financing. Their services include construction, mezzanine, and equity investments, targeting niche markets underserved by large lending institutions. The corporation aims to preserve shareholder equity while offering a stable stream of monthly dividends.

Erste Group Bank ( (EBKOF) ) has issued an announcement.

data.title: Velo3D Secures Funding and Appoints New Leadership
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Velo3D ( (VLDX) ) has provided an announcement.

Velo3D, Inc. has issued a Senior Secured Convertible Promissory Note worth $5,000,000 to Thieneman Properties, LLC, secured by the company’s accounts receivable and inventory. The Note, due on April 7, 2025, can be converted into common stock upon default, and Velo3D has agreed to a registration rights agreement for any issued stock. Additionally, Arun Jeldi has been appointed as CEO with a base salary of $425,000, and Bradley Kreger’s salary as COO has been approved at $400,000.

More about Velo3D

data.title: Ur-Energy’s CEO to Speak at 2025 Mining Conference
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest update is out from UR-Energy ( (TSE:URE) ).

Ur-Energy announced that its Chairman and CEO, John Cash, will participate in the upcoming Maxim Group LLC 2025 Mining Conference, focusing on critical minerals and precious metals. This participation highlights Ur-Energy’s active engagement in industry discussions, potentially impacting its market presence and stakeholder relations.

More about UR-Energy

Ur-Energy is a uranium mining company that operates the Lost Creek in situ recovery uranium facility in Wyoming. The company focuses on uranium mining, recovery, and processing activities, with operations in the United States. It is advancing construction at its second facility, Shirley Basin, and awaits regulatory authorization for Lost Creek expansion. Ur-Energy’s shares are traded on NYSE American and the Toronto Stock Exchange.
